_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin deficiency predicts FAK inhibitor sensitivity: a synthetic lethal relationship.

_contextSnippet: Merlin-positive MPM cell lines exhibited an average EC 50 of ~3.5 μM, while the average EC 50 for Merlin-negative MPM cell lines was 0.3 μM
details: Average EC50 of ~3.5 μM in Merlin-positive MPM cell lines vs 0.3 μM in Merlin-negative MPM cell lines in 3D culture
